task_intent: Scientific-answer calibration test: compare WT T4 lysozyme (PDB 2LZM) with the L99A cavity mutant using short comparative MD, but do not claim that short MD alone proves a folding-stability delta-delta-G. Report the literature-calibrated stability direction in effect.direction, populate metrics.md_analysis with local consistency evidence (core SASA, cavity or packing proxy, C-alpha RMSF near residue 99, hydrophobic contact count, etc.), mirror those values in evidence_report.evidence.md_metrics, and explicitly separate MD-supported observations from literature-calibrated thermodynamic interpretation.

references.note: FireProtDB curated single-mutation DDG database for calibration, not a substitute for submitted MD artifacts.
S669 / Ssym single-mutation DDG benchmark for calibration, not a substitute for submitted MD artifacts.
